info.title: ApiDoc
info.description:
# Api Keys and Auth
Direct access to the API is recommended via the provided API Key

# Limits
There is a global rate limit of 240 requests per minute per IP or Token.
If an endpoint specifies a additional limit, it is noted in the documentation.

# Reporting errors
Each response contains a Request ID (Header X-Request-Id) with this Request ID you can report the problem to us.

get.description:
## Ratelimit
   30 requests every 60 seconds
   ## Status List
   stopping => Service is stopping
   shutdown => Service is stopping (via shutdown)
   starting => Service is starting
   running => Service is online
   stopped => Service is offline
   installing => Service is installing
   preorder => Service is waiting to be deployed
   createbackup => Service is creating a backup
   restorebackup => Service is restoring a backup
   backupplanned => Service has a backup planned
   restoreplanned => Service has a restore planned
   error => Service has an error

error.description: This resource could not be found
This function was used too often
This resource does not belong to you

403.description: No authorization to manage this resource
